text:
Professional Experience



2022 — Present

Senior Data Scientist
Company Name · San Francisco, CA

Lead a team of 4 data scientists building ML models for customer analytics. Designed and deployed a recommendation engine that increased user engagement by 25%. Partnered with product and engineering to integrate ML pipelines into production systems.




2020 — 2022

Data Scientist
Company Name · New York, NY

Developed predictive models for risk assessment and fraud detection in financial services. Built automated reporting dashboards using R Shiny and Tableau, reducing manual reporting time by 60%.




2019 — 2020

Machine Learning Intern
Company Name · Boston, MA

Implemented NLP pipelines for medical text classification. Contributed to research published in a top-tier ML conference. Collaborated with clinical teams to validate model outputs.

Beyond Work
I believe great data science is driven by curiosity. Outside of work, I’m an avid reader of science fiction, a weekend trail runner, and a contributor to open-source ML tools. I also volunteer as a mentor for aspiring data scientists through community organizations. {.section-desc style=“margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:center;”}
